name: agy-plugin
description: Delegate well-scoped subtasks from Codex to the Antigravity CLI (agy / Gemini) as a cheap subagent, with cost discipline and verification gates.

interface.shortDescription: Use agy (Gemini) as a cheap subagent
interface.longDescription: Routes deterministic, high-volume work (scaffolding, test generation, migrations, bulk reads, web research) from Codex to the Antigravity CLI (agy / Gemini) via a hardened wrapper with tiers, background jobs, structured failure codes, digest guards, and verification gates. Codex keeps the judgement-heavy 20%.
defaultPrompt: Use agy-delegate to generate exhaustive unit tests for this module.
Use agy-research to run a cited multi-source research pass on this topic.
